title: .zero-two-one.json — migrate block (spec 002)
description: Additive block written when mode:migrate. Extends the spec 001 manifest schema; all other fields (version, installedAt, updatedAt, mode, phase, tools, files, merged) are unchanged.

mode.description: Set by migrate; distinguishes an adopted project from scaffold/source.

duplicates.description: dest path -> resolution applied to that exact-dest collision.

imported.description: Paths cataloged in requirements/_notes/imported-docs.md (leave-alongside). Keyed for idempotent re-run.

archived.description: original dest -> archive path, so a re-run skips re-archiving.
